recommender_status.warning: This demo report is using fallback recommendations because the OpenAI API key is not currently connected. When the API is enabled, the Recommender IEP will generate longer LLM/RAG-based daily reports.

daily_report.title: Daily Road Safety Report
daily_report.executive_summary: InfraGuard analyzed sampled CCTV traffic evidence across four monitored road segments in Beirut. The system detected 38 total traffic-risk events during the reporting window. One segment was classified as high risk, two were classified as medium risk, and one remained low risk. The highest-priority hotspot was the AUB Gate area, where repeated unsafe proximity, high-density traffic, and reckless-driving indicators were observed.
daily_report.model_limitation_note: This report is generated from dashboard sample data and fallback recommendation text because the live LLM API is not connected yet. The detection and hotspot architecture supports YOLO, CLIP, hotspot scoring, and future RAG-enhanced LLM reporting. Once the API key is connected, this section should be generated by the Recommender IEP using detection evidence, hotspot summaries, retrieved road-safety context, and strict JSON validation.
key_findings: The AUB Gate area produced the highest hotspot score at 0.81 and showed an increasing risk trend.
Unsafe proximity and high-density events were the most important signals in the highest-risk segment.
Hamra main street showed medium risk, mainly related to density and lane-related behavior.
Corniche road showed possible speeding indicators but the trend was decreasing.
Downtown intersection remained low risk and requires monitoring rather than immediate intervention.
recommended_admin_actions: Review the AUB Gate area first because it has the highest risk score and an increasing trend.
Prioritize field review for signage, enforcement, and signal timing around high-density segments.
Continue monitoring medium-risk segments before committing to major infrastructure changes.
Use the dashboard map to compare hotspot locations and identify whether nearby segments share the same risk pattern.
Connect the LLM API and web RAG before final deployment so reports include richer source-grounded explanations.

recommendation.explanation: Fallback recommendation: this segment shows repeated unsafe proximity and density events. A high-priority administrator review is recommended. Once the LLM API is connected, this recommendation should be replaced by a longer RAG-grounded report.
Fallback recommendation: this segment has medium risk with repeated density and lane-related events. Lane marking review is recommended.
Fallback recommendation: possible speeding events were detected, but the trend is decreasing. Enforcement review and continued monitoring are recommended.
Fallback recommendation: this segment is currently low risk. No immediate infrastructure intervention is recommended.
